messages.message:
Error: Cannot create components during render

Components created during render will reset their state each time they are created. Declare components outside of render.

  77 |               <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
  78 |                 <Routes location={location} key={location.pathname}>
> 79 |                   <Route path="/" element={<AnimatedPage><Home onOpenModal={handleOpenModal} /></AnimatedPage>} />
     |                                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^ This component is created during render
  80 |                   <Route path="/shop" element={<AnimatedPage><Shop onOpenModal={handleOpenModal} /></AnimatedPage>} />
  81 |                   <Route path="/about" element={<AnimatedPage><About /></AnimatedPage>} />
  82 |                   <Route path="/contact" element={<AnimatedPage><Contact /></AnimatedPage>} />

  51 |   };
  52 |
> 53 |   const AnimatedPage = ({ children }) => (
     |                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 54 |     <motion.div
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 55 |       initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 56 |       animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 57 |       exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 58 |       transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 59 |     >
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 60 |       {children}
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 61 |     </motion.div>
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 62 |   );
     | ^^^^ The component is created during render here
